title: Software Engineer (DevSecOps) | 12 months Contract & No Bonus
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY
Zenith Infotech (S) Pte Ltd. was started in 1997, primarily with the vision of offering state-of-the-art IT Professionals and solutions to various organizations and thereby helping them increase their productivity and competitiveness. From deployment of one person to formation of whole IT teams, Zenith Infotech has helped clients with their staff augmentation needs. Zenith offers opportunity to be engaged in long term projects with large IT savvy companies, Consulting organizations, System Integrators, Government, and MNCs.

EA 20S0237

Employment Details

Employment type: Contract - 12 months

Location: Fusionopolis, Singapore

Working Hours: 8:30AM to 6:00PM (Mon-Fri)

Salary: $ 7000 - 9500 per month

Working Arrangement: Full Onsite


Role Overview

We are seeking a skilled and proactive DevSecOps Engineer with a strong background in cloud infrastructure and CI/CD automation across AWS, GCP, and on-premises environments. This role is critical to ensuring the secure, reliable, and efficient deployment of containerized microservices. The ideal candidate will bring deep technical expertise, a security-first mindset, and a passion for operational excellence.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and manage secure CI/CD pipelines for containerized workloads. 
  • Deploy and maintain AWS ECS (Fargate) services and associated cloud components (e.g., S3, RDS). 
  • Provision and operate GCP Kubernetes (GKE) clusters using Terraform. 
  • Ensure environment consistency across on-prem SIT and cloud staging platforms. 
  • Implement robust secrets management, IAM policies, and network security controls. 
  • Integrate automated security scanning and compliance checks into CI/CD workflows. 
  • Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and optimize infrastructure reliability. 
  • Maintain comprehensive documentation of deployment architectures and operational procedures.

Required Skills & Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent experience). 
  • Minimum 5 years of experience in DevOps, Cloud Engineering, or related roles. 
  • Strong hands-on experience with AWS ECS (Fargate) and core AWS services. 
  • Proficiency in Kubernetes (preferably GKE) and related tools (kubectl, Helm). 
  • Solid experience with Terraform for infrastructure as code. 
  • Familiarity with CI/CD platforms such as GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, etc. 
  • Deep understanding of cloud security principles including IAM, VPC networking, and secret management. 
  • Strong Linux administration and scripting capabilities (e.g., Bash, Python).

Preferred Skills

  • Experience working in regulated or confidential computing environments. 
  • Knowledge of DevSecOps methodologies and secure software development lifecycle (SDLC) practices.

Soft Skills

  • Demonstrated ownership and a proactive problem-solving approach. 
  • Excellent communication and documentation skills.
  • Ability to thrive in dynamic, multi-environment setups with cross-functional teams.

By submitting your application, you acknowledge and agree that your personal data will be collected, used, and retained in accordance with our Privacy Policy This information will be used solely for recruitment and employment purposes.
